title: commicarpus insularum
intro: Commicarpus insularum is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae, also known as the four o'clock family, native to the Galapagos Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Commicarpus insularum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
